rationale: The citing paper references Brandes, Godes, and Mayzlin (2022) only once, in a grouped footnote listing examples of rating biases when discussing imperfections in consumer ratings. The citation is used as broad background support for a general claim, not for hypothesis development, model construction, identification strategy, or interpretation of the eBay certification results. There is no distinct discussion of the cited paper's attrition mechanism or reminder-based findings in the main argument.
